description.tr: Hanbros UK corporate page presents our values, organisational structure, mission-vision framework and the quality standards guiding logistics projects.
description.en: Hanbros UK corporate page presents our values, organisational structure, mission-vision framework and the quality standards guiding logistics projects.

text.tr:
Brand and SEO separation: This page targets the United Kingdom to Turkey (UK→TR) lane. For Turkey-origin shipping to Europe/UK, use Han Bros Cargo on hanbroscargo.com; each domain uses distinct keywords and corridor messaging.

Use the corporate submenu for mission, vision, quality and legal texts.
text.en:
